sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70710" key="nhpiotrofe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νηπῐο-τροφέω</orth>, <sense id="n70710.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nurse, tend children,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.88</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
